def process_orders(orders: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return [
        {"amount": o["total"], "tax": o["total"] * 0.1}
        for o in orders
        if o["status"] == "pending"
    ]


def get_active_user_emails(users: list[dict]) -> list[str]:
    return [u["email"] for u in users if u["is_active"]]


def transform_data(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return [
        {"id": x["id"], "score": x["score"] * 2}
        for x in items
        if x["score"] > 0.5
    ]


def extract_errors(log_lines: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    return [
        l.split("ERROR:")[1].strip()
        for l in log_lines
        if "ERROR" in l
    ]
